text: How many languages are listed in the Eighth Schedule of the Indian Constitution?
In what year did India win its first Cricket World Cup?
How many members does the Lok Sabha have in total (including Anglo-Indian seats before 2020)?
Approximately how many kilometers of railway track does Indian Railways operate, making it one of the largest in the world?
How many times has Sachin Tendulkar scored a century in international cricket across all formats?
How many states and union territories does India have in total as of 2024?
In an average Indian middle-class wedding, approximately how many dishes are typically served at the dinner buffet? (This is the one thing every Indian actually counts.)
How many floors tall is the Antilia building in Mumbai, home of Mukesh Ambani — the world's most expensive private residence?
Approximately how many crore people voted in the 2024 Indian General Election, making it the largest election in human history?
How many gold medals did India win at the 2023 Asian Games in Hangzhou — its best-ever tally?
Roughly how many startups have been recognised as 'unicorns' (valued at $1 billion+) in India as of 2024?
How many Bollywood films does India produce per year on average — more than any other film industry in the world?
How many rupees does a samosa typically cost at a standard Indian roadside stall in 2024? (The real inflation indicator no economist tracks.)
In the game of Kabaddi, how many players from each team are on the field at one time?
How many chapters (Adhyayas) does the Bhagavad Gita contain?
How many minutes does the average Indian spend waiting for a Swiggy or Zomato order that was promised in '30 minutes'? (Approximately.)
Approximately how many temples does Varanasi, one of the world's oldest continuously inhabited cities, contain?
How many Test matches did MS Dhoni win as India's captain — the most by any Indian Test captain?
How many steps lead to the top of the Qutub Minar in Delhi — the world's tallest brick minaret?
Roughly how many IIT seats are available across all IIT campuses in India as of 2024?
How many years did it take to build the Taj Mahal?
How many children does the average Indian parent want you to be better than? (Trick: it's a very specific, famous number.)
How many medals did India win at the 2024 Paris Olympics in total?
In IPL history up to 2024, how many times has Mumbai Indians won the title — the most of any franchise?
How many space missions has ISRO successfully launched to the Moon so far, including Chandrayaan-3?
Approximately how many people attend the Kumbh Mela in Prayagraj every 12 years — the largest human gathering on Earth?
How many spices is the traditional Indian masala chai recipe said to contain at a minimum?
source: Ayurvedic tradition (cardamom, ginger, cloves, cinnamon, pepper)

text: How many over quota passengers typically adjust themselves into a single auto-rickshaw in a Tier-2 Indian city?
source: Observational data from every Indian town ever

text: How many times did Amitabh Bachchan appear on Kaun Banega Crorepati as host across all seasons up to 2023?
How many metres tall is the Statue of Unity in Gujarat — the world's tallest statue?
